description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named 'MiNiFi-CPP Verify Python Compatibility' that runs on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have multiple jobs for building and testing on different environments, including centos, rocky linux 8 and 9, patched ubuntu 22.04, patched debian bullseye, conda on ubuntu 22.04, and virtual environment on rocky linux 9. Each job should check out the code, install dependencies, build and test with python scripting enabled.
